logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "env": Mule::p('mule.env'), "transactionId": correlationId, "applicationName": app.name , "flowName": flow.name ++ ": Start" , "timestamp": now() , "eventType": "INFO" }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json var toTime = now() as DateTime var fromTime = payload as DateTime --- { fromTime: (fromTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) ++ "T" ++ (fromTime as String {format: "HH:mm:ssxxx"} as String), toTime: (toTime as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) ++ "T" ++ (toTime as String {format: "HH:mm:ssxxx"} as String) }

logger.doc:name: No transmission errors
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "transactionId": correlationId, "message": "There were no transmission errors" }]

logger.doc:name: No message errors
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "transactionId": correlationId, "message": "There were no message errors" }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.transmissionError filter ((t) -> not (vars.messageErrors.transmissionId contains t.id))

%dw 2.0 import substring from dw::core::Strings output application/json ---
vars.effectiveTransmissions default [] map (transmission) -> { direction: transmission.direction default "", partnerFrom: transmission.partnerFromIdentifierValue default "", partnerTo: transmission.partnerToIdentifierValue default "", businessKey: if ((transmission.businessDocumentKey default null) != null) (transmission.businessDocumentKey default "") else (transmission.businessDocumentId default ""), errorMessage: if (sizeOf(transmission.transmissionSteps) > 0) transmission.transmissionSteps[-1].errorMessage else "" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.messageErrors default [] map (msg) -> {
messageType: msg.messageType, direction: msg.direction, partnerFrom: msg.partnerFrom.name, partnerTo: msg.partnerTo.name, businessKey: if (sizeOf(msg.customAttributes) > 0) (msg.customAttributes[0].alias default "") ++ "-" ++ (msg.customAttributes[0].values[0] default "") else (msg.businessDocumentKey default "") }

logger.doc:name: No errors
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "transactionId": correlationId, "message": "There were no errors" }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "env": Mule::p('mule.env'), "transactionId": correlationId, "applicationName": app.name , "flowName": flow.name ++ ": End" , "timestamp": now() , "eventType": "INFO" }]
